creator: gamer@ryppn.com
text: Apologies, examining my config, I suspect a misconfiguration has caused this error due to DNS not completing within the default 1000 seconds. My main.cf contained the line "spf-policy_time_limit = 3600s". I now believe the inclusion of the s was causing the variable to default to 1000 and causing certain lookup errors as quoted. I have removed the offending letter s and will monitor the mail server today and report back if I'm still seeing the issue.
